name: Senate Update via Common Good VA
subject: Mitch McConnell couldn’t be happier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
This race will determine Senate control | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGlk5zbMVFA6w0KHhJVpTdoC6UxJdg24kBu502UW6D8wXFEu9jQj9Y-S1LssqcGSNxa192F-iYlZA5-tMBHhbO1Ag1GmJmWPyVoUS-3oCJ47TxLiYbwlCHz12SXci7xrgZjrd_jTgQf_--i3QbHVumNT06axOR5WhV8luLypBQFZU--Pe9IONF48yrHwr2YmnS8MoX43BNFtH0PDKRimOwCbu1AYjauQSgGosmddKYpxn90qfbsT4VFGqQqTPBc0G2VSJuxfoqo3IpeQFWm4hG3uVV7DkS-MG-bctwY4qRTeuiBGa6tcZB5CugUMes4j3LQ/3eo/l64y_SzPSu2x3GCt6uKXpA/h0/G21zUwp-8nhUWsZWU3KrE9y5JdjKCm9RNVeAmIDvfEw)
Derek, EVERYTHING just changed for control of the Senate — and Mitch McConnell _couldn’t_ be happier.

**_The Cook Political Report_ just downgraded Catherine Cortez Masto’s chances of winning in Nevada – and a GOP extremist backed by Mitch McConnell, Ted Cruz AND Donald Trump just announced his run to defeat her and flip the Senate.

That’s why we set a $50,000 rapid-response goal to make sure Catherine has the resources to fund the ads, phone banks and field teams she needs to keep Nevada – and the Senate – blue. [Derek, can we count on you to split $25 right now between Catherine's team and Common Good VA to help Catherine win in Nevada and defend our Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGlk5zbMVFA6w0KHhJVpTdoDlCCoprjz2bF0XPSW-SEe0k2PrNHPL7FKf1mPx_jsPpmIZw5FRQpLlxySzcFLCIVdgWZnu_t4jaebO8ztKfrMEkds6p2wsOu6t1_RKdgzx_Shpp2d-E_-N6JQsedbihAJwdCYcnXCfPxTYd9GVKuAF5hXFzJJNHXInfx0RSa45TFMykjr0TODaqhLmGEqge_4lT61mHM1Ofnz4QPvgL-fbzOQBSjGIVLLwAAn3-R7iMgDPKAEhMhrv6yS5GF6Bc_9WuzlSzBCUK_0Uu5XZ_B5KqXC1qvsFgG5l0I0RDVtLXQ/3eo/l64y_SzPSu2x3GCt6uKXpA/h1/Hrw8L9T0t5mBVq4wJb8uYooIVJUCycP6fUEy9tlpklA)**

We’ll be blunt, this is HORRIBLE news for Democrats. With the Senate majority _razor-thin_ with a 50-50 split, we can’t afford to lose a single race. But right now, Republicans' chances of winning are SURGING in Nevada where Donald Trump BARELY lost in 2020.

Defending the Senate will come down to defending this seat – but the momentum is not on our side! Losing this seat will hand Mitch McConnell control of the Senate and the power to obstruct everything from voting rights to a Biden nominee on the Supreme Court.

**The ONLY way Catherine can defend this critical battleground seat and our Senate majority is if grassroots Democrats like you join this fight with an immediate donation.** [**Please, before our rapid-response midnight deadline, split a $25 donation between Catherine's team and Common Good VA to defeat McConnell’s handpicked candidate and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGlk5zbMVFA6w0KHhJVpTdoB9Twrahv0pXLYXYWmBeKkDKbDaHh4OnoYdPFx62N-uPxrxRstjnOhb_68v7VmbzqJoS_OcvQ8kKAJDA1r2bJ0OkrKpBQzXJWY5P7QEjpBx1aOoiGFDZ0G-vfm0YcJFxi8p8nxgeqNnNdMyyW8IPSBJMkxjOtBdgj-RlEKy7zL3EC1ovNXTZuw9pcIhC_FCLotAiTrvYwhhz3Ljk2vQi5eg62KJxrtNQshWIJ4Rpv9Hcjtp-AkP-r37FSH5zfq2oQmPpqYfGmUR3MQkD8MehSQFE2J0R00IFU14U8rlcaGX3w/3eo/l64y_SzPSu2x3GCt6uKXpA/h2/pvOnAipUqx0IuXl-LhWqpbwSB8BS-Ojb_1g0J9Aq6ns) **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGlk5zbMVFA6w0KHhJVpTdoDlCCoprjz2bF0XPSW-SEe0LnwcogmIc8OgH_wf1E6lMYtnYYhR1bi3ELvJzUc51CD-awxdwazk_FZ0dJSHbXGIRflUDDgekvS9r6begdLSm6MBcotEWDH4vGAFiuGzHbgrWOM27OXIdlj2GtpFNJZALV5TVkQsyPrbfwPb2aHKymW4AI7T0sAxy8UkXKSzMbRWhksC8XdFk8SliCv5cXryKO8enLiEGVwi2w5dKdvWaOE9p_NMAaCLFsXqY8dvzpFof4Js8fOvcnXjPW0tvm8A-MYrt5wjhJHTeabriLqruA/3eo/l64y_SzPSu2x3GCt6uKXpA/h3/CMnSjTZvlNFjgd_eXek3kTPE085lJN4f8QBGMMKMfks)

name: Ted Budd
subject: Join Me In Prayer For Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
I am asking a favor from everyone on Team Budd. Will you please join me in prayer for the people of Afghanistan?
---
| |
---|---|---
| Peter,

I am asking a favor from everyone on Team Budd. **Will you please join me in prayer for the people of Afghanistan?**

What is happening is a devastating situation. Thousands of innocent men, women, and children are being trapped and brutally beaten by the Taliban. We need God to intervene and heal this tragedy. Join me in asking God to put an end to these Islamic extremists and bring all Americans and our allies to safety.

**Matthew 18:19-20 says, ****“Again I say to you, if two of you agree on earth about anything they ask, it will be done for them by my Father in heaven. For where two or three are gathered in my name, there am I among them.”**

Let's join together and make our requests known to God right now.

Please forward this to your family and friends, and have them join us as well.

God Bless,

Ted Budd |

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Tucker vs. Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169074:JItWS0lAN:m:1:3253819041:75D8DA47A8885F7016404D528AB403CC:r) | |
---
Peter,

With Afghanistan in shambles and Leftists across America trampling our freedoms, "Republican" Adam Kinzinger decided it was finally time to act.

And he stood up for the people he represents by attacking the biggest threat to America... Tucker Carlson???

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169074:JItWS0lAN:m:1:3253819041:75D8DA47A8885F7016404D528AB403CC:r)

_What on EARTH is he thinking?!_

I don't know about you, Peter, but when it's time to choose between Crying Adam Kinzinger and Tucker Carlson, I'm Team Tucker all the way.

**That 's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this clown out of office.**

My name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue_.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. _Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169074:JItWS0lAN:m:1:3253819041:75D8DA47A8885F7016404D528AB403CC:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169074:JItWS0lAN:m:1:3253819041:75D8DA47A8885F7016404D528AB403CC:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it.

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He 's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.

**[> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169074:JItWS0lAN:m:1:3253819041:75D8DA47A8885F7016404D528AB403CC:r)**

Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169074:JItWS0lAN:m:1:3253819041:75D8DA47A8885F7016404D528AB403CC:r)
Thank you,
Catalina Lauf
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: When did YouTube start working for the government?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169149:J9U-U0lEN:m:1:3253819041:F1DDFC53AAD6A0E890CF7979BC89254A:r) | |
---
Peter, YouTube and Google have become an entity so huge that they think they are the arbiter of truth.

And when I spoke out about the complete absurdity of mask mandates, they responded.

By banning me on YouTube for 7 days. **[FIGHT BACK>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169149:J9U-U0lEN:m:1:3253819041:F1DDFC53AAD6A0E890CF7979BC89254A:r)**

As a libertarian-leaning senator, I think private companies have the right to ban me if they want to. But I think it is really anti-free speech, anti-progress of science, and it's really unhelpful to the overall conversation.

Both sides _should_ be able to present facts on either side of a question and complete an adversarial process to reach the truth.

But that's just not what's happening these days in big tech.

I'm not sure when YouTube became an arm of the government... but I am sure that it is an absolute disgrace for our government to proceed with their nonsense, anti-science policies without any repercussions or push back.

_They shouldn 't be protected by big tech giants._

If you agree, please chip in today to fight the censorship and share the truth: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2741522/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169149:J9U-U0lEN:m:1:3253819041:F1DDFC53AAD6A0E890CF7979BC89254A:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Hillsdale College
subject: Socialism rising?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169177:63tD00lNs:m:1:3253819041:F7E9A566B255E441AE01DF6C261778AF:r) Dear Peter,
Two years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
To say "everyone" is a gross exaggeration. But it's clear that socialism has made--and continues to make--inroads in America, especially among the young.
Today, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of that support and the amount of opposition to socialism. With your input, we can form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of liberty in our country.
**Please give your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169177:63tD00lNs:m:1:3253819041:F7E9A566B255E441AE01DF6C261778AF:r)**
With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand mainstream Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.
A recent poll showed that 70% of Millennials are either somewhat likely or extremely likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.
**Why is this?**
For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.
For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.
This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels.
_The New York Times_ ' "1619 Project" is a prime example of this. The mainstream media praised this effort to subvert the proper teaching of American history, and its lead essayist even won a Pulitzer Prize.
In the face of such well-financed efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts have never been more urgently needed**.
By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** , your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.
We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence and underlying the Constitution.
As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."
If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today.
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169177:63tD00lNs:m:1:3253819041:F7E9A566B255E441AE01DF6C261778AF:r)**
In the face of recent successes by the Left, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| As we reflect on the state of affairs in Afghanistan, our hearts go out to the Americans and Afghan citizens currently evacuating, and our heartfelt prayers are with the military and service personnel working to resolve the situation on the ground - as well as the thousands of Americans still trapped there today.
If anything, this catastrophe proves that now, more than ever, we must make our voices heard and fight to restore competent, conservative leadership - which is exactly what Greater Georgia will work to accomplish. In fact, we are already seeing [tremendous success](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wwsnfQ2sk0aGerWEyB46iBfpJOSXSgvJieOn2fER_yb16pdd0F1QTr1aenkInhGA02P3mManSERZCj39WlVwbljMvA0b5EVjFNjhv7cU7s_qpjK0j-_V-u7s10kczPW5GjzbW5EoZJTaQc9oCb03qOCMk68GoznZjJhFs3h0zJtdEz1pqCxNiepjiD6QePIFsQjvBsTx54Q9xaXKkSlCziY--6XykgzJzvelYDbFRD7Ffq4SnbbmXbynCN2AF8Pg&c=odmbUbKYK2W3TPkEYH-Gx5ZS0sigRcK644reFR7dM7OMaEVM02_YIg==&ch=0HfESVU-mfrlMH2zAgMR-5HzDManJm8g9bMwxfCffaJj3trKfLm1Dg==).
Importantly, we are moving full speed ahead to register thousands of new voters. Unfortunately, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution published a [story with incorrect data](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wwsnfQ2sk0aGerWEyB46iBfpJOSXSgvJieOn2fER_yb16pdd0F1QTr1aenkInhGAzBoGvlg9dq6tgH17AA-R93UTAFJ9TuvqlQtgwdVDirEKEjTx3QuGlzRQVs-lvGe4Es1CG9azLXUS0jbSDJOdhnZdlRLlmDsaF7a8FvhuklGaJayFLUx1KAnRBiMLudQMKgR5QuflPh6x-zRingy7Gt_OIJaKgkFh-Yruz2p1s8dFOA6LuxCV7xgtVYg_XtcdJOxN1bfkSMpyKv1vQ4ev0Q==&c=odmbUbKYK2W3TPkEYH-Gx5ZS0sigRcK644reFR7dM7OMaEVM02_YIg==&ch=0HfESVU-mfrlMH2zAgMR-5HzDManJm8g9bMwxfCffaJj3trKfLm1Dg==) this week, claiming that 95 percent of eligible Georgia voters were registered. This claim is false.
Their claim is based on an [old estimate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wwsnfQ2sk0aGerWEyB46iBfpJOSXSgvJieOn2fER_yb16pdd0F1QTr1aenkInhGAUT_5jjrDcG4LqTcSQt3xHrYK2eeBy9USdtvsTm-uE9y_Cr4ucgyyZIQxPofR4Dk6zUJqrouSG2Bi-q_nA6ZdJpBmAn_7eam1jrmj7WIamN-whbG3YYrw4qGp4cfHT-4FrBvpwnsZzN92tfaIYAfuIxe-7sOPSdd1G_KObON53DHN51A0Aht3VCYfSfs3UZhw&c=odmbUbKYK2W3TPkEYH-Gx5ZS0sigRcK644reFR7dM7OMaEVM02_YIg==&ch=0HfESVU-mfrlMH2zAgMR-5HzDManJm8g9bMwxfCffaJj3trKfLm1Dg==), which states the voting-age population is 7.6 million. The actual number of voting-age Georgians - based on [updated data](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wwsnfQ2sk0aGerWEyB46iBfpJOSXSgvJieOn2fER_yb16pdd0F1QTr1aenkInhGAI7QtFtPWm_Foz0Hwxfew1pHsEAXqd25zIpoeTb53vCfGd51muAvlXLmSE0uiqW84MTZbcGtjyCGtBo1-wlItrd3oCA_cBSdsphT1h9OozTj4HwYy8RuV_7kuE8KDkpOLO2UvMf1684Ign19ta6qMAV8p2YvPS_D3BXfvgmWlOzzdVY9R_mVhoysC1hGNDA86seFGl1pyJWw=&c=odmbUbKYK2W3TPkEYH-Gx5ZS0sigRcK644reFR7dM7OMaEVM02_YIg==&ch=0HfESVU-mfrlMH2zAgMR-5HzDManJm8g9bMwxfCffaJj3trKfLm1Dg==) from the 2020 census - is 8.22 million, meaning the number of unregistered voters is actually far greater than the AJC's claim.
Greater Georgia knows there is a lot of work to be done, and we are putting in the hours to make sure we can keep Georgia red in 2022 and beyond - but we need your help!
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wwsnfQ2sk0aGerWEyB46iBfpJOSXSgvJieOn2fER_yb16pdd0F1QTsIcDtLR31u6PwGAu2NYUmFe5zCP7ysfEPnnMyPnqkMaAHmxaDV4ILo_xc1DNUiXPuGXYlCN9WO_7y2-4ZbWn0BT5aaTjV6XlDoRN6wUMFJJLpVIi9R-Gcw=&c=odmbUbKYK2W3TPkEYH-Gx5ZS0sigRcK644reFR7dM7OMaEVM02_YIg==&ch=0HfESVU-mfrlMH2zAgMR-5HzDManJm8g9bMwxfCffaJj3trKfLm1Dg==) or the button below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values.

| INTERNSHIP PROGRAM
Greater Georgia has officially launched an internship program! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress.
If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application.
The full internship application can be found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wwsnfQ2sk0aGerWEyB46iBfpJOSXSgvJieOn2fER_yb16pdd0F1QTr1aenkInhGA1NV6yNVyUKTPG4DS43UZqlW67FqV2VRZGPNyANPHK7-PjdN68NAeBUD6WV9ZQS_o4ME5qy2-mSOkDcwmu6gzJsQfQ2ZI1630dc_Xj5wPwHsBqoFzbF_fI_jNS2zIdwvMnIe7kX0hxdFzTw6Xe0_7TMB0gE0nML-rDbC84i8m6eg=&c=odmbUbKYK2W3TPkEYH-Gx5ZS0sigRcK644reFR7dM7OMaEVM02_YIg==&ch=0HfESVU-mfrlMH2zAgMR-5HzDManJm8g9bMwxfCffaJj3trKfLm1Dg==).

| LOEFFLER PENS OP-ED IN AJC: New conservative advocacy group showing results in Ga. Aug. 6, 2021 - [Atlanta Journal-Constitution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wwsnfQ2sk0aGerWEyB46iBfpJOSXSgvJieOn2fER_yb16pdd0F1QToUQzERnBuAGM9Dw99vs6-2HJyumi8bcEHWPJdXkoKkUsdpH0TSY6XNc9dVjLxMO5KraLGLq64H4KxJ3O4eW6dTy-hzRSoLMZJ35m2S_EpJiDQpsfmhNyRyvFPc1Jk4Bfkew9PUbFkQiHnJPD18g54kgMucPibQ18R1bN31nX8cOPR1-ub284ie7Ta0AXrLeYuvBhPMB0QAeuTgefQVwL2mLvtre3H9tmw==&c=odmbUbKYK2W3TPkEYH-Gx5ZS0sigRcK644reFR7dM7OMaEVM02_YIg==&ch=0HfESVU-mfrlMH2zAgMR-5HzDManJm8g9bMwxfCffaJj3trKfLm1Dg==)
"Beginning in April, Greater Georgia began organizing and building out a targeted engagement program hyper-focused on registering new voters within [State House District 34] ... Along with our registration program, we executed a strategic plan to mobilize voters through text, telephone, direct mail, and paid digital advertising efforts.
... The results were astounding. Not only did [the conservative] win convincingly, taking 63 percent of the vote ... he overperformed the 2020 race for the seat by a full 7 points. Based on our post-election analysis of multiple targeted voter contacts, Greater Georgia's efforts directly contributed to 23 percent of the vote by engaging new, low-propensity and disenfranchised voters -- putting a swing suburban seat, in the 3rd-most-populous county in our state, firmly back in the red column."
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wwsnfQ2sk0aGerWEyB46iBfpJOSXSgvJieOn2fER_yb16pdd0F1QToUQzERnBuAGM9Dw99vs6-2HJyumi8bcEHWPJdXkoKkUsdpH0TSY6XNc9dVjLxMO5KraLGLq64H4KxJ3O4eW6dTy-hzRSoLMZJ35m2S_EpJiDQpsfmhNyRyvFPc1Jk4Bfkew9PUbFkQiHnJPD18g54kgMucPibQ18R1bN31nX8cOPR1-ub284ie7Ta0AXrLeYuvBhPMB0QAeuTgefQVwL2mLvtre3H9tmw==&c=odmbUbKYK2W3TPkEYH-Gx5ZS0sigRcK644reFR7dM7OMaEVM02_YIg==&ch=0HfESVU-mfrlMH2zAgMR-5HzDManJm8g9bMwxfCffaJj3trKfLm1Dg==) to read the full article.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | As we reflect on the state of affairs in Afghanistan, our hearts go out to the Americans and Afghan citizens currently evacuating, and our heartfelt prayers are with the military and service personnel working to resolve the situation on the ground - as well as the thousands of Americans still trapped there today. If anything, this catastrophe proves that now, more than ever, we must make our voices heard and fight to restore competent, conservative leadership - which is exactly what Greater Georgia will work to accomplish. In fact, we are already seeing ==. Importantly, we are moving full speed ahead to register thousands of new voters. Unfortunately, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution published a == this week, claiming that 95 percent of eligible Georgia voters were registered. This claim is false. Their claim is based on an ==, which states the voting-age population is 7.6 million. The actual number of voting-age Georgians - based on == from the 2020 census - is 8.22 million, meaning the number of unregistered voters is actually far greater than the AJC's claim. Greater Georgia knows there is a lot of work to be done, and we are putting in the hours to make sure we can keep Georgia red in 2022 and beyond - but we need your help! Click == or the button below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | | == | | | | UPDATES: | INTERNSHIP PROGRAM Greater Georgia has officially launched an internship program! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress. If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application. The full internship application can be found ==. | | | | 11TH DISTRCT GOP EVENT Greater Georgia registered and spoke with voters at the 11th District GOP Marksmanship Event and BBQ Reception, hosted by Adventure Outdoors in Smyrna Aug. 20, 2021 | == | == | == | == | == | == | | | == | | | | IN THE NEWS: | LOEFFLER PENS OP-ED IN AJC: New conservative advocacy group showing results in Ga. Aug. 6, 2021 - == "Beginning in April, Greater Georgia began organizing and building out a targeted engagement program hyper-focused on registering new voters within [State House District 34] ... Along with our registration program, we executed a strategic plan to mobilize voters through text, telephone, direct mail, and paid digital advertising efforts. ... The results were astounding. Not only did [the conservative] win convincingly, taking 63 percent of the vote ... he overperformed the 2020 race for the seat by a full 7 points. Based on our post-election analysis of multiple targeted voter contacts, Greater Georgia's efforts directly contributed to 23 percent of the vote by engaging new, low-propensity and disenfranchised voters -- putting a swing suburban seat, in the 3rd-most-populous county in our state, firmly back in the red column." clean_body: Ron Johnson is gearing up for reelection, and we need to stop any early momentum before it’s too late. | | = | = = Rick Scott, Chair of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, is right, Peter. Ron Johnson is going to run for reelection, and he’s been spending his time behind the scenes raising millions of dollars to keep his seat in Mitch McConnell’s hands. A Ron Johnson win would mean Majority Leader Mitch McConnell. There’s a narrow path to holding on to our Senate Majority if Ron Johnson wins another term -- and that’s why we’re fighting to unseat him. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Look, Peter, we’re going to be up against a lot in the next year. Despite his anti-vaccine lies, his denial of climate change, and his conspiracy theories, Republican leadership is ready to defend Ron Johnson at every opportunity -- and are doubling down on their efforts to keep him in the Senate. That’s why we need to build a team to fight back and win. It’s going to be tough, but we know that Wisconsinites don’t back down from tough fights. = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Up for a challenge?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Are you up for a challenge, Peter? Let me briefly explain:

As you may remember, my team sent around an email last week to let you know about a system update that kept us from sending you messages for nearly a week. I wanted to be honest with you about where that's left us for the month.

I know we told you it wasn't a big deal -- and it still isn't -- but it has kept our fundraising slightly behind where we need to be right now. We were hoping to have made up for lost ground, but we're not quite there yet.

The end of the month is approaching quickly, and we can't afford to go into the last part of August on this note. We just ran the numbers, and I'll cut to the chase: we need to raise $2,613 before midnight to get our fundraising back on track.

Can you add a donation of $5 or whatever you can to help us close the gap? I'm counting on you more than ever before, Peter.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-august-21

Look, I don't want you to think that the sky is falling because it's not, but August's numbers just aren't good enough to take down a deep-pocketed opponent like Ron Johnson. That's the hard truth.

Unlike him, I don't have a Rolodex full of right-wing mega-donors willing to cut a big check that would make up for this temporary lapse. But I do have something much more powerful: grassroots supporters like you -- and I couldn't be more grateful for it.

Thank you so much for your support,

Sarah

Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today.

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-august-21

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are the best way for us to stay in touch, but if you need to go, please unsubscribe here: [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2c5e2b58-e501-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/e6c4e9ad-5903-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmM0ZTlhZC01OTAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1Ja4xWVyaF77vC2ZHn5hVMZH-VbTmitDfqiZ9tgc1s=&id=121241219] If you only wish to receive our most important updates, submit this form for fewer emails [https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/a/less-email]. If you'd like to support Sarah's campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, please add a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-donate?refcode=em2021&amount=10] to help us win.

Republicans are threatening to wipe that progress away, Derek. Their candidate for Governor, Glenn Youngkin, opposes paying people a fair wage, even as he promises to spend $75 million of his personal fortune to buy the Virginia Governor’s office for Donald Trump.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34476918/302083365/683353327?refcode=20210822_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTkyYmVjYy01YTAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYO04KfR0lchq7ExaWwOtkydvW0vpow9-wjN9wQVRes=) Friend, this will be quick – and I really need your help: 1\. We knew Georgia was going to be a critical battleground – _again_ – but now, POLITICO reports that our race will decide which party controls the Senate. 2\. Republicans have made me their top target for next year's critical elections, and they're already outspending us on misleading attack ads in order to smear my record and turn Georgia red. 3\. Our grassroots campaign is **falling****$17,871****short** of what we need to fight back, hit our midnight fundraising goal and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, the GOP's attacks could leave a major mark.** **We cannot hand Georgia – and our critical Senate majority – back to Mitch McConnell and the GOP when everything from our voting rights to health care is under attack.** But according to analysts at _The Washington Post_ , that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground race. **Please, friend, I'm counting on you. With time running out before our critical midnight deadline, I'm asking you to give every dollar you can spare right now: ** [**Will you split a donation between me and Seth Moulton before 11:59 p.m. tonight to hit our goal, win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34476919/302083366/683353327?refcode=20210822_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTkyYmVjYy01YTAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYO04KfR0lchq7ExaWwOtkydvW0vpow9-wjN9wQVRes=) We're so close, friend – thank you. — Raphael Warnock

name: Team Malcolm
subject: Building coalitions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Donations from real, working people like you are what fund our work
#

Friend,
Supporters like you are the key to our strategy to win this race. That’s because donations from real, working people like you are what fund our work to send a working person to the U.S. Senate.
When you chip in to our campaign, your dollars go right to work helping us build a big coalition of support behind our movement for healthcare, green union jobs, climate action, voting rights, and so much more.
They pay for staff to plan our path to victory, videos to share how growing up in the North Philly projects motivated Malcolm into becoming an activist for his community, and events to connect with folks in communities across all of Pennsylvania's 67 counties.
They make sure working people like us have a seat at the table in the US Senate, which is currently overwhelmingly old and extremely wealthy.
**And the early stages of this race are all about building lasting momentum — that means every dollar from every donor makes a big difference, especially right now.**
[So we have to ask: Could you pitch in a few bucks to our campaign to elect Malcolm today? We need your support to make sure Pennsylvania’s next Senator is someone who will always go to bat for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34478587/302090310/-353695395?refcode2=8f4c7710-6203-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210822-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjRjNzcxMC02MjAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KF3QE-aGN8CI8pHDj15V5EzQhsdSC6CjBBrDpfJrqmE=)

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082221 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082221]

Dear Friend,

There are legislators in Pennsylvania who have been working to dismantle our democracy, piece by piece.

Starting with lies and conspiracy theories, they create confusion. Next, they are toiling to put anti-democratic legislation in place to make sure your ballot doesn't get counted.

We are fighting that anti-democratic nonsense the only way we can, by empowering and educating voters. To make sure that our next election is secure from attempts to corrupt it, Keystone

Progress Education Fund provides support and resources in areas of the state that are often overlooked. We're training communities to mobilize, protect, and exercise their sacred right to vote -- but we need your help.

This is a truly urgent request. Please donate today to grow our efforts in this key battleground state before our democracy is so fractured that it can never be repaired. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082221]

name: PACT - Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: Teachers Union LAWSUIT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
They are SUING a parent for requesting to know what her child is learning.

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169253:6Ur7TRliN:m:1:3253819041:CF5C798ADA2295EC3B7073F363BF6EA2:r)
---
Peter,

**A teacher's union is SUING a parent for daring to ask what her child is learning in school.**

_A Rhode Island chapter of the National Education Association has filed a lawsuit against a parent in order to block the release of records concerning Critical Race Theory and gender "education" in schools._

**In other words, the NEA has filed a lawsuit to keep parents in the dark about the indoctrination being forced upon their children.**

Parents Against Critical Theory (PACT) is fighting for the rights of all parents, but we need your help to come out victorious. **Would you donate today to help us take down the teachers unions and their manipulative games?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us fight back against the Teachers Unions> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169253:6Ur7TRliN:m:1:3253819041:CF5C798ADA2295EC3B7073F363BF6EA2:r)**

In a complaint filed in the Superior Court, the teacher's union claims that the teaching records are "private," and their release must be balanced against the "rights" of teachers.

**They are completely forgetting about the rights of parents.** We have a right to know exactly what our children are being taught in the schools that WE fund with OUR tax dollars.

_We can no longer look to our elected officials to defend us. We must take matters into our own hands and fight for change._

_Join us and the millions of parents that have had enough as we fight CRT and institutionalized racism._

**[DONATE HERE to help PACT put an end to the lawsuits and bullying. >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169253:6Ur7TRliN:m:1:3253819041:CF5C798ADA2295EC3B7073F363BF6EA2:r)**

If we don't stand up, then no one will.

Sincerely,

Parents Against Critical Theory

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Tucker vs. Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169257:6ezZ8RlNc:m:1:3253819041:09FF5A1B1B43368413F86BDDF3C3D842:r) | |
---
Peter,

With Afghanistan in shambles and Leftists across America trampling our freedoms, "Republican" Adam Kinzinger decided it was finally time to act.

And he stood up for the people he represents by attacking the biggest threat to America... Tucker Carlson???

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169257:6ezZ8RlNc:m:1:3253819041:09FF5A1B1B43368413F86BDDF3C3D842:r)

_What on EARTH is he thinking?!_

I don't know about you, Peter, but when it's time to choose between Crying Adam Kinzinger and Tucker Carlson, I'm Team Tucker all the way.

**That 's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this clown out of office.**

My name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue_.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. _Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169257:6ezZ8RlNc:m:1:3253819041:09FF5A1B1B43368413F86BDDF3C3D842:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169257:6ezZ8RlNc:m:1:3253819041:09FF5A1B1B43368413F86BDDF3C3D842:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it.

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He 's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.

**[> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169257:6ezZ8RlNc:m:1:3253819041:09FF5A1B1B43368413F86BDDF3C3D842:r)**

Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169257:6ezZ8RlNc:m:1:3253819041:09FF5A1B1B43368413F86BDDF3C3D842:r)
Thank you,
Catalina Lauf
---
---

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter. As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need TERM LIMITS in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda. As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame. I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together. Thank you, Catalina Lauf | | | Paid for by Catalina for Congress | | | | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Rand Paul
subject: I Won’t Listen to Fauci Anymore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Liberty Caucus
body:
Dr. Anthony Fauci has been wrong time and time again during this COVID-19 Pandemic
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e2lqODJSuy2YF5hqG3lKFg/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Republican Liberty Caucus.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fNlmozFn5Pa1Em6HLEjFqA/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fNlmozFn5Pa1Em6HLEjFqA/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ "Headline") My Fellow American: Dr. Anthony Fauci has been wrong time and time again during this COVID-19 Pandemic, _and we need to stop allowing him to set public policy._ He was wrong about closing the schools. He was wrong about mask mandates. He was wrong about the origin of this disease. He is wrong to support eviction moratoriums. **[I am working to ensure our rights are never taken away like this again, and I need your help.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fNlmozFn5Pa1Em6HLEjFqA/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ "I am working to ensure our rights are never taken away like this again, and I need your help.")** In the coming months, you will hear politicians explain away their unconstitutional lockdowns and mandates as _" following the science."_ **Don 't let them get away with it.** They are scaredy-cats who abdicated their responsibility to lead our nation because they were afraid of being made fun of on Saturday Night Live or at the DC Cocktail parties. **I am sick of these cowards taking away our liberties and then throwing their hands up when we prove them wrong AGAIN.** **[I won't forget, and we need to make sure that the rest of the nation doesn't either. I am working with the Republican Liberty Caucus - and that's why I am asking you to stand with me in support of their organization.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fNlmozFn5Pa1Em6HLEjFqA/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ "I won’t forget, and we need to make sure that the rest of the nation doesn’t either. I am working with the Republican Liberty Caucus – and that’s why I am asking you to stand with me in support of their organization.")** Put simply, the RLC is the conscience of the Republican Party - something we need now, more than ever. A group of freedom-loving individuals focused on ensuring no elected or appointed member of our government can trample on our Constitutional Rights. Just as we need to rebuild our nation's economy, we need to rebuild the Republican Party and those who represent us in government. That hard work begins right now, and with your support, it will be led by the Republican Liberty Caucus. | | [SUPPORT THE RLC WITH $45 ››](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HwloE0892L7632UFzmnVX4SbDw/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ "SUPPORT THE RLC WITH $45")
---
| [SUPPORT THE RLC WITH $90 ››](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jK479N3oKXvR763Ff4qUQfmw/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ "SUPPORT THE RLC WITH $90")
---
| [SUPPORT THE RLC WITH $250 ››](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/QUW8olq65bc1OWhZMJdhdw/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ "SUPPORT THE RLC WITH $250")
---
| [SUPPORT THE RLC WITH MORE ››](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fNlmozFn5Pa1Em6HLEjFqA/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ "SUPPORT THE RLC WITH MORE")
---
We seem to have forgotten the principles that make us great during the Pandemic. You, me, and the Republican Liberty Caucus are going to remind them.
**[Please, your donation of $45 or more could make all the difference as we seek to Take Back America.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HwloE0892L7632UFzmnVX4SbDw/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ "Please, your donation of $45 or more could make all the difference as we seek to Take Back America.")**
If you believe in America, if you believe in the Republican Party, and if you believe in finding out the truth about COVID-19 and putting our economy back on track, then **[please donate today.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fNlmozFn5Pa1Em6HLEjFqA/WCiLRlHEj4GKoP7p763IIYQQ "please donate today.")**
Thank you for your time. God Bless America.
Rand Paul
U.S. Senator, Kentucky
| **Paid for by the Republican Liberty Caucus
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee**

Hi Peter, **Nearly 1,000 people in North Carolina and beyond have already responded to our recent poll asking your opinion on Medicaid expansion!** It’s clear that support for expanding access to quality health care is strong. As we continue to try to put this pandemic behind us, we know that it’s never been more important to make sure everyone has access to the healthcare they need. Roy has spent years fighting to expand Medicaid in North Carolina, and he’ll keep working for as long as it takes. Our team is extending the deadline for responses to our poll for another 24 hours to make sure you have a chance to share your thoughts. **[Click here to answer our one question: Do you support expanding Medicaid to cover the more than 500,000 North Carolinians who need health care?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34484450/302111894/577255628?source=em_RC_PET_Medicaidpoll2_082221_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTU3MDkwNS03NzAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qspbNY_zoPW-DPHEVAmzwarj-wp76qKyrf2uMuhh40Q=&emci=0f4d02f0-ca01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2a570905-7703-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)** | [TAKE THE POLL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34484452/302111896/577255628?source=em_RC_PET_Medicaidpoll2_082221_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTU3MDkwNS03NzAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qspbNY_zoPW-DPHEVAmzwarj-wp76qKyrf2uMuhh40Q=&emci=0f4d02f0-ca01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2a570905-7703-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)

subject: Voting has begun!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169267:6bAzpRlNC:m:1:3253819041:AC1C304966556A513A589A9759708DDB:r)

---
**URGENT: Voting by mail is underway and the deadline to return your ballots is less than 30 DAYS away.**

[**Peter, we need your help reaching as many voters as possible before they mail in their ballot, so we can be sure they vote YES on the recall question. Can we count on you to send in $10, $20, $30 so we can fund our get-out-the-vote efforts in this final stretch?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169267:6bAzpRlNC:m:1:3253819041:AC1C304966556A513A589A9759708DDB:r)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169267:6bAzpRlNC:m:1:3253819041:AC1C304966556A513A589A9759708DDB:r)
The latest polls are showing that this recall is neck and neck, and we need you to help us reach and sway voters before they turn-in their ballots. It's imperative to the future of California that we make sure to get as many recall ballots returned as possible, but we can't do it without you.

Simply put, this is crunch time and everybody in the state should have received their ballots in the mail. Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled.

[**Help us show Gavin that this recall isn 't a partisan effort, this is from Californians of all backgrounds . . . we're tired of his failed attempt at leadership, are you?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169267:6bAzpRlNC:m:1:3253819041:AC1C304966556A513A589A9759708DDB:r)

Thank you,

Lou Barnett

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Quick
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we’ll keep this brief.
[**Before the weekend is over, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation right to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210822-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1178_6688874_tKbL67&akid=1178%2E6688874%2EtKbL67)
This month, CNN _again_ named us one of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. We are consistently near the top of the list which tells us there’s a lot of eyes on this race.
And to make things worse, Donald Trump flew to Arizona last month to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to get comfortable. National Republicans think they can take back this seat in 2022, and the fact that Trump is already attacking us at rallies means they are serious.
Mark needs our support to hold this seat, and the best way we can do that is by making sure we have the resources to run another strong campaign and win a full six-year term to the Senate.
**Your support this weekend will go a long way, so please use the link below to make a donation:**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/August-Goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210822-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1178_6688874_tKbL67&akid=1178%2E6688874%2EtKbL67)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1178%2E6688874%2EtKbL67).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Please donate $3 to support our efforts to pass universal background checks and ensure students are safe in their classrooms.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
As schools are reopening across the country for in-person learning, all anyone can talk about is the threat of COVID-19 spreading in schools.
#

Friends —
As schools are reopening across the country for in-person learning, all anyone can talk about is the threat of COVID-19 spreading in schools.
Don’t get us wrong — that is a very real threat and one that we need to take seriously. But many parents and students are worried about something else entirely:
_School shootings._
It’s a horrible reality to think that schools being closed during the pandemic is the reason why our students have been safe from school shootings. But it’s true — and now we need to prepare for the fact that as students return to classrooms, we may also see a return to school shootings.
That’s why we are redoubling our efforts to pass universal background checks so we can make our classrooms and communities safer by preventing these tragedies from ever taking place. So we have to ask:
[**Please, if you can afford it, donate $3 to support our efforts to pass universal background checks and ensure students are safe in their classrooms. As schools are reopening for the first time in over a year, there has never been a more important time to give.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210822-1-15&t=1&refcode2=721_3935704_mpAQKm&akid=721%2E3935704%2EmpAQKm)
Right now, Americans are worried about their health and safety during this pandemic. As students return to class, we want them to be as safe as possible. No student should have to worry about gun violence, especially in places of learning.
And now more than ever, we need Americans to feel safe. Your donations help us continue the essential work in the fight against gun violence.
Thank you for standing with us.
The team at Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210822-1-15&t=2&refcode2=721_3935704_mpAQKm&akid=721%2E3935704%2EmpAQKm)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=721%2E3935704%2EmpAQKm) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Tim Ryan for Ohio
subject: $5 for 5 Republican opponents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress

name: Never Again PAC
subject: Call Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Since the January 6 attack on our Capitol, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy has done everything in his power to impede an investigation into the insurrection. McCarthy shot down a bipartisan investigation earlier this year, and when asked to nominate Republicans for Pelosi's select committee -- he included Republicans who promoted Trump's Big Lie and voted to overturn the election results. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34487022/302121449/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0ZGU5Yzk3LTgzMDMtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oNq-GOIudEb9svHm7Y2P31i1PeCrcsrB9ahPyaE3ec0=&emci=783cfc06-ce01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=14de9c97-8303-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) Team,

Since the January 6 attack on our Capitol, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy has done everything in his power to impede an investigation into the insurrection.

McCarthy shot down a bipartisan investigation earlier this year, and when asked to nominate Republicans for Pelosi's select committee -- he included Republicans who promoted Trump's Big Lie and voted to overturn the election results.

The select committee investigation is underway, but McCarthy is sending a message that he won't participate willingly. When asked if he would comply with a subpoena, McCarthy simply laughed, and he even admitted to not watching the testimony of the Capitol police officers.

Kevin McCarthy might not be concerned with the truth about the events of January 6, but we are. That's why we're calling and emailing McCarthy to urge him to fully cooperate in this investigation.

The future of our democracy depends upon uncovering the truth. Will you help us put the pressure on?

**[Join us in sending a message to McCarthy that the American people demand his cooperation. Make a call or send an email now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34487023/302121450/-1430518508?gpsid=8_139_20199&ms=em21_210822_prog2_adv_gq_act__nap_ettx&refcode=em21_210822_prog2_adv_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210822_prog2_adv_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0ZGU5Yzk3LTgzMDMtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oNq-GOIudEb9svHm7Y2P31i1PeCrcsrB9ahPyaE3ec0=&emci=783cfc06-ce01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=14de9c97-8303-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001)**

Thanks,

Never Again PAC Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34487024/302121451/654191739?gpsid=8_139_20016&refcode=em21_210822_prog2_adv_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210822_prog2_adv_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0ZGU5Yzk3LTgzMDMtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oNq-GOIudEb9svHm7Y2P31i1PeCrcsrB9ahPyaE3ec0=)

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34487658/302124757/683353327?refcode=20210822_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTc0N2UxYi04NjAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kd7CoPa1hqau5iGA2LJn8uGDP-ef7XzJoGTQArPeyBk=) Friend, this will be quick – and I really need your help: 1\. Republicans have made me their top target for next year's critical elections, and they're already outspending us on misleading attack ads in order to smear my record and turn Georgia red. 3\. Our grassroots campaign is **falling****$17,871****short** of what we need to fight back, hit our midnight fundraising goal and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, the GOP's attacks could leave a major mark.** **We cannot hand Georgia – and our critical Senate majority – back to Mitch McConnell and the GOP when everything from our voting rights to health care is under attack.** But according to analysts at _The Washington Post_ , that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground race. **Please, friend, I'm counting on you. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I hope you’ll read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi, in a moment I’m going to ask you to chip in to my reelection campaign. But first, I hope you’ll take a minute to read about why this race matters, and how important your support is to me. **In just a few days, right-wing billionaire Betsy DeVos will be in New Hampshire to rally Donald Trump’s base.** DeVos and her family have donated _hundreds of millions of dollars_ to Republican causes and candidates – and her visit is a clear signal that the Trump network is laser-focused on flipping New Hampshire red. I first got involved in public service to ensure that all Americans, regardless of personal circumstances, have the opportunity to succeed. My decision to run for office was inspired in large part by my advocacy to ensure that my son Ben, who experiences severe disabilities, and other kids like him would have the same opportunities as their peers. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, I specifically questioned her on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. **Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.** It was clear that Ms. DeVos was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. Her confirmation passed by just one vote – with Mike Pence breaking the tie. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, folks. Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and Betsy DeVos are fully invested in New Hampshire, and that’s bad news for our Senate majority. **[If you can, please make a $5 donation to my campaign today to protect this vulnerable seat and our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34488102/302125819/565612021?refcode=e20210822_mwh-devos2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGIyNTI3Mi04ODAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T9KeYa6dVV5bICCEcBA6dGCpWLK_XhRrQRdlNGZCHs4=)** It’s been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate. But recent polls show me down. **If we lose New Hampshire, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.** I’m not done working for Granite Staters and all Americans, but I need you with me for the tough fight ahead. Thank you so much. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34488103/302125820/565612021?refcode=e20210822_mwh-devos2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGIyNTI3Mi04ODAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T9KeYa6dVV5bICCEcBA6dGCpWLK_XhRrQRdlNGZCHs4=)

clean_body: | | | Hi, in a moment I’m going to ask you to chip in to my reelection campaign. But first, I hope you’ll take a minute to read about why this race matters, and how important your support is to me. In just a few days, right-wing billionaire Betsy DeVos will be in New Hampshire to rally Donald Trump’s base. DeVos and her family have donated hundreds of millions of dollars to Republican causes and candidates – and her visit is a clear signal that the Trump network is laser-focused on flipping New Hampshire red. I first got involved in public service to ensure that all Americans, regardless of personal circumstances, have the opportunity to succeed. My decision to run for office was inspired in large part by my advocacy to ensure that my son Ben, who experiences severe disabilities, and other kids like him would have the same opportunities as their peers. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, I specifically questioned her on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law. It was clear that Ms. DeVos was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. Her confirmation passed by just one vote – with Mike Pence breaking the tie. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, folks. Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and Betsy DeVos are fully invested in New Hampshire, and that’s bad news for our Senate majority. = It’s been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate. But recent polls show me down. If we lose New Hampshire, Democrats will lose the Senate majority. I’m not done working for Granite Staters and all Americans, but I need you with me for the tough fight ahead. Thank you so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Stop the Insanity!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Our schools have been converted into indoctrination centers. Here's proof. Laura Morris has been a public-school teacher for 10 years. She has always loved her students and been a dedicated mentor and educator to them. Recently, the Super Intendent for her school district demanded that she spread his radical propaganda... Like Critical Race Theory (CRT). **The Superintendent even asked her colleagues to turn her in if she privately disagreed with his CRT agenda.** That's why earlier this month, after dedicating her entire life to her students, Mrs. Morris tearfully resigned in front of the school board: "I quit your policies, I quit your training, and I quit being a cog in a machine that tells me to push highly politicized agendas to our most vulnerable constituents - children." [**The 1776 Project PAC is an organization dedicated to shutting down CRT, and kicking these radical leftists of our local school boards. Will you send in $35 dollars today to remove and replace radical school board members?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169315:JHODmRlNa:m:1:3253819041:054C5E38C2D20E3B670CF8D4F006EBB8:r) Because Mrs. Morris's story isn't the only one that has come out of public schools in the last couple of weeks... Kila Mosey, a black mother from Atlanta, GA, discovered that the principal of her school had separated kids into "white classes" and "black classes." But friend, it gets worse... Nicole Solas, a Rhode Island mom, demanded that her school district disclosed whether they were forcing CRT on students. When she kept demanding answers, the Teacher's Union SUED HER to intimidate her. They're shameless. They don't think we have a right to decide what our kids are being taught, and they'll do anything to stop you from having a say. [**This insanity will never end unless we stand up. Every day we don 't act we lose another member of the next generation. We simply cannot afford to wait. Will you send in your $35 donation to shut down these radical leftists and stop CRT TODAY?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169315:JHODmRlNa:m:1:3253819041:054C5E38C2D20E3B670CF8D4F006EBB8:r) But let me step back and introduce myself. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I'm the founder of the 1776 Project PAC. My vision for this organization is to send the radical left packing and fill our nation's school boards with America-loving patriots. Already, concerned citizens just like you have contributed thousands to shut down CRT by removing and replacing left wing extremists. [**But if we are going to be successful on a national scale, we need your help today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169315:JHODmRlNa:m:1:3253819041:054C5E38C2D20E3B670CF8D4F006EBB8:r) You see, when you contribute to 1776 Project PAC, your dollar does more to impact the future of our country than it could anywhere else. Each school board race that we're targeting will cost between $10,000-$20,000 to win. That's pennies on the dollar compared to the average Congressional race. And what's worse is that most politicians in D.C. do nothing but grandstand without ever achieving anything for their constituents. **Every dollar that the 1776 Project PAC receives is a highly effective investment into the future of our country because we fund the races of people who have a direct say over what students are learning in YOUR hometown.****** By removing and replacing anti-American leftists from school board you're ensuring we don't raise a generation that **hates America and hates one another based on the color of their skin.** [**Will you chip in $35 today to help us save our kids, and our nation 's future from CRT?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169315:JHODmRlNa:m:1:3253819041:054C5E38C2D20E3B670CF8D4F006EBB8:r) Thank you in advance, P.S. I grew up in a country that taught me to love others, regardless of the color of their skin, their religion, or their political views. But our nation's kids are being taught something entirely different. They're being taught that all white people are racist, and that all black people are victims. I'm not just heartbroken at what the left is doing. I'm infuriated by it. [**Will you rush in $35 today to help the 1776 Project PAC end the insanity by firing from CRT radicals from local schoolboards?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169315:JHODmRlNa:m:1:3253819041:054C5E38C2D20E3B670CF8D4F006EBB8:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169315:JHODmRlNa:m:1:3253819041:054C5E38C2D20E3B670CF8D4F006EBB8:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169316:JHODmRlNa:m:1:3253819041:054C5E38C2D20E3B670CF8D4F006EBB8:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fl_goMZ-04qYHYy21T38mtKngJYSsKJ7WQkWtW3ltJM8FQGsQO8gJOilTSY7oLwxn5hu9kjSENFllXiQhhT8-IYijXmQV6TuNvu0fypdAH8QfMqDj58H1qDLag2nyFPdsq0MDhw2xAhJYvVowL1lUJ1oPDXg7pRYlWln5_7tgzQw6onf2hwpUuYG_AMsYQEzQiPkyFXfr_P6PvLMyV7OtT9IpY_ARz5z4zjHTT4Oa_FbxpV8vW58IbiOzkypf_Y12SEe7GODTux2sIKdzOfM6GY/3eo/rHcBEoqPT6-50T_nALl7-g/h0/BoIWYQHg9OYnOiCh54Nu7d_3XWs_IsNCvZ0clC6gbDI)
Derek — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but Common Good VA said we could reach out because you might want to see this. CNN released an article titled **"The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022"** ....and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race: _“Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.”_ We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans. This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us. **** [**This is where you come in, Derek: if you are able, will you split a $15 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good? Articles like this make us a top target of Mitch McConnell and we need your help to prepare for the next wave of attack ads.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FrkGsiQFZ0GIdnsCAT4XAjIhctrwWyLUp-RbGDjGXh08_p6TTb1JIhCVrfVY51WDGUFxVdG9L9hTn9XtjlR0w6IoaO3Rlb3hRKWzFQO6arfz02bW9Rx1vr5qqYcBwxCY1Yd9ILDqspfDBZwyzlX4uRm4EDQAQtIaocOlXOjJXApaEbe_42VLqJtwfsYPLrIYyS9RtqTo4n4KYa7X-1UJpriBYNg2jSOFayb9BsGNYYQZNJU8w1JIBcH1vZ-gcfN7h7F2ZCU29Gj0pzHI5nVN-febE4AOg0LdUa656-W3Bh7Q/3eo/rHcBEoqPT6-50T_nALl7-g/h1/9wjN-eEcrvUdYoPXmJ4X6fJBEfEU_15J_QcowncBD7k) You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against us by National Republicans because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate. However, we know that with your help we can run another successful campaign in 2022 and hold this Arizona seat. So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back. Team Kelly

clean_body: | | | Derek — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but Common Good VA said we could reach out because you might want to see this. CNN released an article titled "The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022" ....and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race: “Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.” We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans. This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us. **** You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against us by National Republicans because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate. However, we know that with your help we can run another successful campaign in 2022 and hold this Arizona seat. So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back. Team Kelly | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Charlie Crist
subject: A quick note

body:
Supporters like you have helped get my campaign for governor off to an incredible start. |

| | Supporters like you have helped get my campaign for governor off to an incredible start. I couldn’t be more thankful.

You’ve shown me that Floridians are ready to build a Florida for All and move past the failures of the DeSantis era.

Thanks for everything,
Charlie

name: Great America Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c399%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jYqFOcUUgU8OnaGY6L4%2fbg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65021%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3DwaU7ATEqgYUuFVJRj8Aw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65021%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3DwaU7ATEqgYUuFVJRj8Aw&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65022%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NISQjFGZyTuuY%2bD3z%2bzHeQ&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c399%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jYqFOcUUgU8OnaGY6L4%2fbg&sysid=1)_

|

name: Elaine Luria
subject: We’re living through an unprecedented attack on our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34491184/302134738/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjA2ZTU4Yi05ODAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lreeqHVHcIRl6eDltbgjQL12sD46TXrrihelFNddiag=)

| | Folks, I spent 20 years in the U.S. Navy defending our democracy. Believe me when I say that, in all my years serving this country, I have never seen an attack on our democracy like the one we’re currently living through. After Trump lost the election, Republican legislatures around the country launched an assault on the right to vote. At least 17 states have enacted 28 laws to restrict voting access. **And for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power between presidents was denied because one party attempted to overturn the results of a free and fair election.** Not only have they yet to be held accountable for their actions, but Republicans are continuing to spread lies and sow doubt about the legitimacy of President Biden’s election. In Congress, I’m doing everything I can to ensure attacks like this don’t happen in the future and to protect our sacred right to vote. But I’m a top target for national Republicans trying to regain control of the House, and some of my opponents still refuse to admit that President Biden won the election. **Holding our House majority has never been more important and my race will be one of the closest in the nation. So, I’m asking you today:[Can you chip in $25 to give me the resources to defend my seat and our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34491185/302134739/-1006850060?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_210822_FR_AttackonDemocracy_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjA2ZTU4Yi05ODAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lreeqHVHcIRl6eDltbgjQL12sD46TXrrihelFNddiag=)** | | | [Chip in $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34491186/302134740/-1006850060?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_210822_FR_AttackonDemocracy_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjA2ZTU4Yi05ODAzLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lreeqHVHcIRl6eDltbgjQL12sD46TXrrihelFNddiag=)

clean_body: we need your HONEST opinion: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | | | | | If Trump and his crooks get their way, millions of Americans won’t have access to medications or even their Social Security checks. That’s why we’re conducting this tracking poll to hear from Democrats like you. | | | | | We really appreciate your response! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

| | | | | |
