| Peter,
---
| **Joe Biden gave Afghanistan to the Taliban** ... _abandoning_ tens of thousands of our citizens and allies to brutal terrorists. Then, **he went on vacation.** Joe Biden is unfit to serve as Commander-in-Chief, and I'm calling on you--as a patriot--to **[sign the petition demanding his Cabinet REMOVE him from office under the 25th Amendment.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169341:J4lFbRl5N:m:1:3253819041:673B49D9B0DB61006D5B82BD8B912AA1:r "sign the petition demanding his Cabinet REMOVE him from office under the 25th Amendment.")**

---
| Don't let the media fool you: this has _nothing_ to do with whether the U.S. should have left Afghanistan. It's about **how Joe Biden so badly bungled this mission** and**failed to protect our allies, our people, and our military secrets.** Or as Barack Obama once put it, **" Don't underestimate Joe's ability to f*** things up."** Joe Biden has disgraced our nation, betrayed our allies, and destroyed all international trust in America... and then, he refused to take responsibility. **[American patriots must hold him accountable. Sign the petition to DEMAND the Cabinet REMOVE Joe Biden from office under the 25th Amendment>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169341:J4lFbRl5N:m:1:3253819041:673B49D9B0DB61006D5B82BD8B912AA1:r "American patriots must hold him accountable. | Thanks,

Candace

| | **Team, listen. Donald Trump is determined to flip Nevada red.** And the truth is: _He almost did in 2020._ Trump lost this state by ONLY 2.5%. When he learned that was losing -- Trump fought back... \-- He threatened to withhold federal funding when Gov. Sisolak expanded access to the ballot box

\-- He sued our state when Gov. Sisolak passed a bill to allow mail-in voting

\-- He filed bogus voter suppression lawsuits in our most diverse county

\-- He undermined our voting system on national television and accused Gov. Sisolak of _personally_ inserting fraudulent ballots into the election counts
Now, Donald Trump just reported a $100 million fundraising haul that he’ll gladly use to **unseat Governor Sisolak and elect a MAGA Republican to the governor’s mansion who will hand him a red Nevada in 2024.** **[This is what we’re up against. clean_body: How are we letting this guy win? | | | = | | Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 -- it’s a statistical TIE, and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year. My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office. Youngkin’s a GOP extremist -- he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump THREE times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. We’re blowing this one, Derek. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I just don’t get how we’re letting Youngkin roll over us. | Dear Patriot, My heart weeps for Afghanistan. Thousands of lives lost, trillions of dollars spent, and it all ends in chaos and disaster. Joe Biden, you are an embarrassment to this country, and you are not fit to be president! Biden butchered Trump's plan to bring the troops home safely, and the result of that was violence, death, and destruction. Now we are left with the aftermath. Some reckless leaders in Washington, D.C., refuse to learn the lessons from this debacle. They want to repeat the same mistakes that led America to this point. And many of those same people are trying to defeat me in my Senate race next year, so that I can no longer stand in their way. I cannot allow that to happen. There must never be another disaster like Afghanistan. Never again! The war in Afghanistan was an ill-conceived mess to begin with, and now it has imploded in front of the whole world. I am one of the only leaders in Washington, D.C., who fights for President Trump's America First foreign policy. But that stance has made me very unpopular in Washington. And the Left is running a well-funded socialist against me to try to defeat me. Joe Biden must not be allowed to take me out. He has caused enough damage already. Trump was right. So was my father, Ron Paul. Sadly, the establishment in Washington, D.C., refused to listen to either one of them. And now, because of the recklessness, incompetence, and arrogance of our leaders, Afghanistan has imploded. The lessons of this calamity are clear: Joe Biden is an incompetent president, and the endless war in Afghanistan was a terrible mistake. Never again must America engage itself in a catastrophic nation-building adventure like Afghanistan. And never again must America elect an inept president like Joe Biden. The reckless establishment in Washington, D.C., wants to repeat the mistakes that were made in Afghanistan. But the Democrats know that I'm standing in their way. That's why they want to take me out so desperately. And they're running a socialist against me to try to make that happen. clean_body: | | | | | | | | "It was a horrible decision going into the Middle East. And I know the Bush family will not be happy, but I believe it was the worst decision in the history of our country when we decided to go into the Middle East." \- President Donald J. Trump, August 17, 2021 | | Dear Patriot, My heart weeps for Afghanistan. Thousands of lives lost, trillions of dollars spent, and it all ends in chaos and disaster. Joe Biden, you are an embarrassment to this country, and you are not fit to be president! Biden butchered Trump's plan to bring the troops home safely, and the result of that was violence, death, and destruction. Now we are left with the aftermath. Some reckless leaders in Washington, D.C., refuse to learn the lessons from this debacle. They want to repeat the same mistakes that led America to this point. And many of those same people are trying to defeat me in my Senate race next year, so that I can no longer stand in their way. I cannot allow that to happen. There must never be another disaster like Afghanistan. Never again! The war in Afghanistan was an ill-conceived mess to begin with, and now it has imploded in front of the whole world. I am one of the only leaders in Washington, D.C., who fights for President Trump's America First foreign policy. But that stance has made me very unpopular in Washington. And the Left is running a well-funded socialist against me to try to defeat me. Joe Biden must not be allowed to take me out. He has caused enough damage already. Back in 2011, when my father was running for president, Donald Trump tweeted, "Ron Paul is right that we are wasting trillions of dollars in Iraq and Afghanistan." Trump was right. So was my father, Ron Paul. Sadly, the establishment in Washington, D.C., refused to listen to either one of them. And now, because of the recklessness, incompetence, and arrogance of our leaders, Afghanistan has imploded. The lessons of this calamity are clear: Joe Biden is an incompetent president, and the endless war in Afghanistan was a terrible mistake. Never again must America engage itself in a catastrophic nation-building adventure like Afghanistan. And never again must America elect an inept president like Joe Biden. The reckless establishment in Washington, D.C., wants to repeat the mistakes that were made in Afghanistan. But the Democrats know that I'm standing in their way. That's why they want to take me out so desperately. And they're running a socialist against me to try to make that happen. This catastrophe cannot happen again. America must change course now. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | | **** P.S. Reckless leaders like Joe Biden and a misguided war in Afghanistan have brought embarrassment to America. A catastrophe like this must never happen again. Donald Trump had a plan to exit Afghanistan safely, and Joe Biden butchered it. Sadly, America is now paying the price for the recklessness of leaders like Joe Biden. I will fight the D.C. establishment every step of the way if they try to repeat the terrible mistakes of Afghanistan. And the Democrats know it ... ... which is why they're running a socialist against me to try to take me out. | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Tucker vs. Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169352:6OAKlRlN7:m:1:3253819041:D154067B1365513B3CEE64CD58D91241:r) | |
---
Peter,

With Afghanistan in shambles and Leftists across America trampling our freedoms, "Republican" Adam Kinzinger decided it was finally time to act.

And he stood up for the people he represents by attacking the biggest threat to America... Tucker Carlson???

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169352:6OAKlRlN7:m:1:3253819041:D154067B1365513B3CEE64CD58D91241:r)

_What on EARTH is he thinking?!_

I don't know about you, Peter, but when it's time to choose between Crying Adam Kinzinger and Tucker Carlson, I'm Team Tucker all the way.

**That 's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this clown out of office.**

My name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue_.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. _Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169352:6OAKlRlN7:m:1:3253819041:D154067B1365513B3CEE64CD58D91241:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169352:6OAKlRlN7:m:1:3253819041:D154067B1365513B3CEE64CD58D91241:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it.

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He 's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.

**[> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169352:6OAKlRlN7:m:1:3253819041:D154067B1365513B3CEE64CD58D91241:r)**

Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58169352:6OAKlRlN7:m:1:3253819041:D154067B1365513B3CEE64CD58D91241:r)
Thank you,
Catalina Lauf

I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm ACTUALLY a Republican. But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a damn clue. Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington. In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party. He's gone all in with the fake news. Total Trump Derangement Syndrome. He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump! He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission. He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington. Here's MY reaction to THAT: Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv. His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing? After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood. This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place. That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it. Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat. Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. He 's working for them, after all. And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare: I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants I'll fight for the America First agenda I'm ACTUALLY a Republican! That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022. If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight. Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation. Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter. As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need TERM LIMITS in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda. As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame. I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together. Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: America's political prisoners
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
We can't be distracted. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=645b3b1338&u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1ed029848c)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d2cfeea6cf&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

We have a major crisis unfolding in Afghanistan, thanks to the non-existent leadership of our "Commander-in Chief."

American citizens are stranded there because the Biden Administration foolishly packed up the military and left before our citizens could get out.

That's an urgent problem that needs to be solved, and the Biden Administration, woke generals, and incompetent cabinet officials must pay.

But we also have to keep our eye on the ball, because we still have political prisoners being held right here in Washington, D.C.

Peaceful protestors from January 6 are being confined in solitary confinement for nonviolent crimes.

It's wrong and un-American, and their constitutional rights are being violated as I type this message.

_Some don't have trial dates. Some are being denied access to attorneys. I'm told the conditions in the jail are horrific_...

..._And the prisoners were put on lockdown after I tried -- and was barred -- from visiting them last week_.

The Communist Democrats must release their political prisoners right away, and I won't stop making a fuss about it until they do.

[**Show me you have my back with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1ba5984c71&e=645b3b1338).

I am doing all that I can to help, but I need you to understand what's at risk, friend.

The GOP Establishment doesn't want us asking questions about the January 6 prisoners, and the RINOs already have me as their _Number One_ target for replacement next year.

It could cost me my political career, but I don't care. _It's crucially important that we demand the release of the January 6 prisoners before America descends into a Communist hell_.

[**With your generous contributions to my reelection campaign today, you can tell the Establishment that you want to KEEP this America First warrior in Washington**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d012138fab&e=645b3b1338).

[**_A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or MORE to my reelection campaign right away, helps me fend off anything the Establishment D.C. Swamp might throw at me while I fight for freedom for the political prisoners stuck in D.C. jail_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=617243e158&e=645b3b1338).

We must stay focused on the issue at hand, fellow patriot, and continue to demand the release of America's political prisoners.

The Biden regime wants to condemn the Taliban -- as it should -- but we can't let them get away with crimes against humanity here on American soil.

How can we have any moral authority around the world if committing human rights violations here at home?

This is a gravely serious problem, fellow patriot, and I fear that we may be reaching the point of no return.

[**These are perilous times for our Republic, and just a small gift today goes a long way towards helping me fight the Communist Democrats and free their political prisoners**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ae9eef83c2&e=645b3b1338).
---
| Thank you in advance for remembering America's political prisoners.

For Freedom,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=fe1d60ca58&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** While the world turns it's attention to Joe Biden's catastrophe in Afghanistan, hundreds of mostly peaceful January 6 protestors are STILL being held as political prisoners by Democrats in Washington.

[**Help me fight the Communist Democrats and free these politically persecuted patriots with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=2aa68ac51a&e=645b3b1338).
---

While the world turns it's attention to Joe Biden's catastrophe in Afghanistan, hundreds of mostly peaceful January 6 protestors are STILL being held as political prisoners by Democrats in Washington. . | | PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Paul Gosar for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: "Being Democrat, it's just what you do"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d461c06e3a2c4ab182021d26914c009e&_e=UkMhzlUvPmoB3KxfPcsJokPRRDHfM3Dqj7iJ-bqPa_nV5_qAg9Za1wCc8QT8d_ComDgnHyE89b9vWcWg-Yl6CLOJRN70qhTGgykRp_HX1VycmscJ-KmnTCoqskdmxUKEHnb1I75iecOO9aOgGgniZPPhmyu3JmdhPQsmKGtJpYsycMVc83NOuosYnM0t-G_XgKC31sfqLsr2d-vyvUUjHa4Y3_4Ia0Pgv6_MPLUIzxiUcRAdQ9-axOfZ-pTYpqb9dNW-IZJkVc70FrRFSRDn-OFkw__OPeMYEDQ_XIhajsx3BWvIXC-oWTcbR0lvr0XAWpkaVmVpwwm_J6FYW-bBC7jceeOe941gfIXS6hium1SY7iOhkZwg0lATdx98us9ckJ1lH0twptrT-BFvYfsyMywSFMKofVXiwiszcKi6xWrG4i67Q9_B3Cd6uKYb-mByX_PH-1baH2IbZ7D7Um6JF5PktpOk65-s0Q81RA7CcAk%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d461c06e3a2c4ab182021d26914c009e&_e=UkMhzlUvPmoB3KxfPcsJokPRRDHfM3Dqj7iJ-bqPa_nV5_qAg9Za1wCc8QT8d_ComDgnHyE89b9vWcWg-Yl6CLOJRN70qhTGgykRp_HX1VycmscJ-KmnTCoqskdmxUKEHnb1I75iecOO9aOgGgniZPPhmyu3JmdhPQsmKGtJpYsycMVc83NOuosYnM0t-G_XgKC31sfqLsr2d-vyvUUjHa4Y3_4Ia0Pgv6_MPLUIzxiUcRAdQ9-axOfZ-pTYpqb9dNW-IZJkVc70FrRFSRDn-H8SPkayzBeLYgAcTwrQhWAi_QLZ7H-t3gcO6rXXsy8snH3KCbQcolGS9Ao2KNOui0COUxIxOKJ_2o89RRMXyktAkUY0PnMQRyGKePGVgiA7JFJUe4p9UmXKGkdzauAMww7MRIPjKepvoFzqEz_wkU7pykkawyXVrvBgsEOB6c9MxdEqM2yNpuz-Fuco_Hamo0fWwrPzzQW_z5z8NRjFbt0%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d461c06e3a2c4ab182021d26914c009e&_e=UkMhzlUvPmoB3KxfPcsJokPRRDHfM3Dqj7iJ-bqPa_nV5_qAg9Za1wCc8QT8d_ComDgnHyE89b9vWcWg-Yl6CLOJRN70qhTGgykRp_HX1VycmscJ-KmnTCoqskdmxUKEHnb1I75iecOO9aOgGgniZPPhmyu3JmdhPQsmKGtJpYsycMVc83NOuosYnM0t-G_XgKC31sfqLsr2d-vyvUUjHa4Y3_4Ia0Pgv6_MPLUIzxiUcRAdQ9-axOfZ-pTYpqb9dNW-IZJkVc70FrRFSRDn-LpNZ8lIdwJ96Bn1cMHkxWmHuHRfft07YHMnltigBO0QPoC4YgBIjwlhbrz8lcF_DtFPkB_PItWiUaqe_RLorfnXeAb4TLicBh52wkb_zktAj3UyiUBP33xzyJbxWdt_sVE3TllebNngD6TulquJn7xFxKDN2BIBp2fgytBgfPubSYPqOu1mCZWV0NT2q57WDw2eNK88eRV_uJAXERUSVQk%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d461c06e3a2c4ab182021d26914c009e&_e=UkMhzlUvPmoB3KxfPcsJokPRRDHfM3Dqj7iJ-bqPa_nV5_qAg9Za1wCc8QT8d_ComDgnHyE89b9vWcWg-Yl6CLOJRN70qhTGgykRp_HX1VycmscJ-KmnTCoqskdmxUKEHnb1I75iecOO9aOgGgniZPPhmyu3JmdhPQsmKGtJpYsycMVc83NOuosYnM0t-G_XgKC31sfqLsr2d-vyvUUjHa4Y3_4Ia0Pgv6_MPLUIzxiUcRAdQ9-axOfZ-pTYpqb9dNW-IZJkVc70FrRFSRDn-F23kUinLfJO5qhS1AR_ab6btKtRW5wtsMmUyJeh6YyRoN8ScN-Q15q_x7XqhAnLX5f-IxfY5Kd3ocOjT4N5H9o9D5wGUIrtfTW2uqH3omhstCJQVeFxvzpHjXqDRIpKXy3RqP6PxPhxNRK_DfkWtGQGH-t4oJIExSK9pAtxDGup-5vEZI0aLiAF3IkervnVhXsokUvfSrs_3nGZhUeU6pc%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d461c06e3a2c4ab182021d26914c009e&_e=UkMhzlUvPmoB3KxfPcsJokPRRDHfM3Dqj7iJ-bqPa_nV5_qAg9Za1wCc8QT8d_ComDgnHyE89b9vWcWg-Yl6CLOJRN70qhTGgykRp_HX1VycmscJ-KmnTCoqskdmxUKEHnb1I75iecOO9aOgGgniZPPhmyu3JmdhPQsmKGtJpYsycMVc83NOuosYnM0t-G_XgKC31sfqLsr2d-vyvUUjHa4Y3_4Ia0Pgv6_MPLUIzxiUcRAdQ9-axOfZ-pTYpqb9dNW-IZJkVc70FrRFSRDn-CdKDXZyaJy3aKRsuol7882x5bmP0s3utAXaMs4hqhS6TMTmi6buE23qcUWe-AbRUJt8hkfg8dzgaTZVbtznJGGr3OHwkKDCwWP-uYRzhgnoHHCZ-sdifyb6pUEUlJ-lThH_5qHf14olB1fhSd9-9t4ONTjAoP9UkMa6OGIHIdkXHBUbT8SH-Z88f3er3RrXQyJMpkIKF-PkKDxgR2fCmP4%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d461c06e3a2c4ab182021d26914c009e&_e=UkMhzlUvPmoB3KxfPcsJokPRRDHfM3Dqj7iJ-bqPa_nV5_qAg9Za1wCc8QT8d_ComDgnHyE89b9vWcWg-Yl6CLOJRN70qhTGgykRp_HX1VycmscJ-KmnTCoqskdmxUKEHnb1I75iecOO9aOgGgniZPPhmyu3JmdhPQsmKGtJpYsycMVc83NOuosYnM0t-G_XgKC31sfqLsr2d-vyvUUjHa4Y3_4Ia0Pgv6_MPLUIzxiUcRAdQ9-axOfZ-pTYpqb9dNW-IZJkVc70FrRFSRDn-B7CpEPqz8LBuQ9S7qCZOFN1UQu7x0pN8efnv6sue5-iC4d2Pc9CyIoy5vydf7UCQpsOevStJkyx9A09JrFFFL8Cp9TXJuq7YT8r4EMkAXRmphZHdY2XocQfHGXe2P65qx4I1Vh2ytupb1LG-oHjHwNlfZLMssHx8PitfstYpYE4n_B6j68a3X7OIeac8VVZaGyu51cJUs8WKAkXf9CGvfg%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=d461c06e3a2c4ab182021d26914c009e&_e=UkMhzlUvPmoB3KxfPcsJokPRRDHfM3Dqj7iJ-bqPa_nV5_qAg9Za1wCc8QT8d_ComDgnHyE89b9vWcWg-Yl6CLOJRN70qhTGgykRp_HX1VycmscJ-KmnTCoqskdmxUKEHnb1I75iecOO9aOgGgniZPPhmyu3JmdhPQsmKGtJpYsycMVc83NOuosYnM0t-G_XgKC31sfqLsr2d-vyvUUjHa4Y3_4Ia0Pgv6_MPLUIzxiUcRAdQ9-axOfZ-pTYpqb9dNW-IZJkVc70FrRFSRDn-L5fHgjFWqX1My1oiijg0NLHWu_LRAmRM5Hws23Eyl-wB2BVtq9F1UWsIlVrwuUsvVbde6JPQdyY_RBCDR6XmUp3EYGjhxd9ub7vjK1I2JI-s66YNJeQyKXLN9mJAwniCRdf5WP7808SQTAnxx8m-ib5-93tIkRoBz9Ms7xffDVGJk93CmStUWvSpr3Eiq19ZVsOeOadDt6FQPj-ILbj1F0%3D)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What Bernie and I told the Biden administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
There's just no reason we should be supporting more oil infrastructure right now.
#
Peter,
Last week, I joined my friend Bernie Sanders and some of our Democratic colleagues in the House and Senate to oppose the Line 3 Pipeline. Here’s why:
**Local indigenous tribes have outright opposed this oil pipeline.** It would destroy their land, food sources, and water. Not only were they not consulted, many local indigenous activists have actively protested the pipeline — facing assaults and arrests at the hands of police.
**The impacts of this pipeline on climate change will be devastating.** We cannot be building more fossil fuel infrastructure as the climate crisis becomes more and more irreversible. Climate change has been declared a “code red” for humanity by international experts. There’s just no reason why we should be supporting more oil infrastructure right now.
**[Trump approved this pipeline. Now WE need to stop it. I’m leading the fight against Line 3 in Congress. Can you donate $3 to show the power of our movement to protect indigenous lands and avert further climate disasters?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4867?refcode=em20210822-560&t=19&akid=560%2E420207%2EZpv7_G)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4867?refcode=em20210822-560&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=560%2E420207%2EZpv7_G)**
We are simply asking President Biden to uphold promises he made about the environment and fighting climate change. Pumping more fossil fuels through more pipelines is NOT part of an environmentally sound policy. And the Biden administration cannot continue the assault on indigenous lands that Trump perpetrated.
Cancel the Line 3 Pipeline and let’s get back to solving the climate crisis. **[If you agree, chip in $3 to fuel my work on this critical issue.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4867?refcode=em20210822-560&t=21&akid=560%2E420207%2EZpv7_G)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210822-560-footer&t=22&refcode2=560_420207_Zpv7_G&akid=560%2E420207%2EZpv7_G)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=560%2E420207%2EZpv7_G)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=560%2E420207%2EZpv7_G)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

clean_body: re: Demand Joe Biden’s Resignation | TO: Peter Willis FROM: NCGOP HQ RE: President Biden Must Resign Did you see Joe Biden’s disaster of a press conference, Peter? In fact, “plan” may be generous because it implies that he had a plan in the first place. The truth is that everything Joe Biden has promised about Afghanistan has been either wrong or a lie. He’s not at all in control of the situation. | | Joe Biden is so feckless that he makes Jimmy Carter look like Ronald Reagan. He’s a disaster! Sleepy Joe has failed us, Peter -- and now he’s trying to gaslight the public with lies and misdirection. It’s time for American Patriots like you to stand up and say ENOUGH! Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party
